item.title: RayMol 1.4.1
item.description:
## RayMol 1.4.1
A stability and polish release on top of 1.4.0 — fewer crashes, lighter memory use, and smoother editing.
### Stability - **Fixed several crashes and a data-loss case.** Three issues found in review that could crash the app or lose unsaved work are resolved. - **Plugged Metal memory & resource leaks.** The renderer no longer accumulates GPU memory and resources over a long session, so RayMol stays lighter the longer it runs.
### Rendering & export - **Accurate high-resolution export.** Depth-of-field blur and outline width now scale with the output resolution, so a hi-res render looks like what you see on screen (WYSIWYG). - **Cleaner tone mapping.** Tone-map and exposure no longer subtly muddy the render.
### Performance - **Smoother movie export.** Movie rendering now runs off the main thread, so the interface stays responsive while a movie is being written. - **Snappier color editing.** The inspector color pickers are debounced, so dragging a color no longer stutters the view.
### Under the hood - AI/MCP control is now thread-safe — automated commands are marshaled onto the main thread, fixing intermittent failures. - Packaging scripts now fail loudly rather than ever shipping a broken bundle.
Built on the open-source PyMOL engine. Updates install automatically via the in-app updater (**Check for Updates…** in the app menu).
